zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Calthorpe於大約1379年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，他的父親William Calthorpe13歲，母親Alianore Mautby20歲。他於大約1403年與Amy de Wythe結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯馬爾包。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Calthorpe于大约1379年出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，他的父亲William Calthorpe13岁，母亲Alianore Mautby20岁。他于大约1403年与Amy de Wythe结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1421年在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯馬爾包。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Calthorpe was born about 1379, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, his father, William Calthorpe, was 13 and his mother, Alianore Mautby, was 20. He married Amy de Wythe about 1403. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1421, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Barnham, St. Martins, Suffolk, England: St Martin's Church, Barnham, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Calthorpe est né environ 1379, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Calthorpe, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Alianore Mautby, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Amy de Wythe environ 1403. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1421, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Smallburgh, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Calthorpe um 1379 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Calthorpe 13 und seine Mutter Alianore Mautby 20. Er hat um 1403 Amy de Wythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1421 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Smallburgh, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Amy de Wythe circa 1403. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1421, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Smallburgh, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Calthorpeが約1379年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父William Calthorpeは13歳，母Alianore Mautbyは20歳であった。約1403年にAmy de Wytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスマルブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Barnham, St. Martins, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 바른함 스트 마틴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1379년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Calthorpe(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore Mautby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1403년 Amy de Wythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스몰버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.Church Chancelmi, Burnham Thorpe, Norfol: Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1379, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Calthorpe, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Alianore Mautby, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Amy de Wythe aproximadamente 1403. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1421, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Smallburgh, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Barnham, St. Martins, Suffolk, England: ст мартин'с чурч, барнам, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Calthorpe родился около 1379 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Calthorpe было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Alianore Mautby, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Amy de Wythe около 1403 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1421 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности смаллбург, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Calthorpe nació aproximadamente 1379, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Calthorpe, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Alianore Mautby, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Amy de Wythe aproximadamente 1403. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1421, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Smallburgh, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
